title: polish dashboard UI: gauge, key CTA, consistent styles
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Dashboard glow-up
gist.blurb: The dashboard got a little polish. Pollen gauges are now actually readable regardless of your balance, and we added some friendly pointers for generating your first API keys.
gist.summary: Updated the dashboard UI to ensure pollen balance gauges remain visible at all values and added explanatory empty states for API keys.
gist.impact: Navigating your account is smoother, with clearer visual feedback on your pollen usage and better onboarding for new developers.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about UI polish, specifically a dashboard, gauges/meters, and keys. The bee mascot (Polly) could be painting or polishing a dashboard/control panel. A gauge or meter showing pollen levels. A shiny golden key.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, polishing a retro control panel with a glowing lime green (#ecf874) pollen gauge. A shiny golden key rests on the console. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
